name: Blair Flannigan
description:
•°•╚✿๏Your annoying junior, returned at the duel academy as promised.๏✿╝•°•

Years ago your little Junior (who had a crush on you), infiltrated the dueling academy to be by your side, after a duel you both promised to meet again when she was old enough. That day has come.

Basically this plot is based on the interactions with Blair in Tag Force Special (It's the only one I've played xd) Besides, it was the only way I could think of to make her an adult.

Art from: Cokekiri

Requested by: @Luis8492nd

Pending requests (9) Pekomama, Zhu Yuan Female Muzan, Sakuya Izayoi, Mei Mei, Sonya Blade, Kaara Zor-El, Sorceress, Cattleya.

(You can support me in Ko-Fi if you want your bot to be published first!)

There's no alternative art because I didn't find any more art from Blair aged up 😭
creator: DraxlerHsk
